description: Code Enforcement — manages property maintenance complaints, violation investigations, notice and order issuance, abatement tracking, and compliance monitoring

hard_stops.label: Imminent Danger — Emergency Abatement Required
hard_stops.logic: Condition constitutes imminent danger to life or safety — emergency abatement authority must be invoked immediately per municipal code

hard_stops.label: Notice Not Served Within Statutory Period
hard_stops.logic: Violation notice was not served on the property owner within the required statutory timeframe — notice is void

hard_stops.label: Due Process Violation
hard_stops.logic: Property owner was not provided an opportunity to correct or appeal before penalty assessment — due process not satisfied

soft_flags.label: Repeat Offender
soft_flags.logic: Property has had 3 or more code enforcement cases in the past 24 months — consider escalated enforcement action

soft_flags.label: Compliance Deadline Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Compliance deadline is within 7 days and violation has not been corrected — prepare follow-up inspection
